CustomField.description: Defines the date range window (in days) used during donation matching. The data import process searches for existing Opportunities or Payments with a date within this many days of the imported Donation Date and selects the closest match. A value of 0 requires an exact date match.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the number of days from the Donation Date to search for matching Opportunities or Payments. The closest match within this range is selected. Use 0 for exact date matching only.
CustomField.label: Number of Days from Donation Date
